DRAFT
  • Installation
  • View page source

Installation

Requirements

  • Python >= 3.6

  • numpy, scipy, matplotlib

  • pyparsing >= 2.0.2

Optional (depending on the analysis):

  • CAMB – CMB power spectra and derivatives for Fisher forecasting.

  • pySM3 – Galactic dust and synchrotron simulations.

  • healpy – HEALPix map handling.

From source

Clone the repository and install with pip:

git clone https://github.com/sriniraghunathan/DRAFT.git
cd DRAFT
pip install .

For development (editable install):

pip install -e .

Verifying the installation

import DRAFT
print(DRAFT.__file__)
